channel.title: buildings on wil oc ward | university of sheffield
channel.description: Recent content in buildings on wil oc ward | university of sheffield

item.title: Active Building Centre
item.description: The Active Building Centre Research Programme is researching and developing innovative tools and technologies that will ensure buildings of all scales contribute to a reduction in carbon emissions and a more sustainable built environment. The research I am involved in is looking at scalable solutions to residential building retrofit, by learning features and properties from large scale multi-source datasets, including visual imaging, thermography and LiDAR.
